<!--
Per CLAUDE.md §9.1, features are enhancements aligned with the spec. If the
feature is NOT in the spec, this is actually a spec issue first — please use
the "spec issue" template instead.
-->

## What

One-line summary.

## Why

What user need does this serve? Cite the relevant spec section if any.

## Sketch

Optional: rough syntax / API sketch. The full design lands in a spec PR before
implementation per CLAUDE.md §5.5.

## Phase / crate

Which phase (0–5 per `docs/CLIFFORD_SPEC.md` §11) and crate does this live in?
